record.field: <form><header><button name="action_invoice_sent" type="object"/><button name="%(action_account_payment_register)d" type="action"/><button name="%(action_view_account_move_reversal)d" type="action"/><button name="button_request_cancel" type="object"/></header><field name="name"/><field name="state"/><field name="invoice_date"/><field name="amount_residual"/><field name="payment_state"/><field name="status_in_payment"/><field name="origin_payment_id"/><field name="statement_line_id"/><field name="matched_payment_ids"/><field name="reconciled_payment_ids"/><field name="payment_count"/><field name="need_cancel_request"/><field name="show_reset_to_draft_button"/><field name="reversed_entry_id"/></form>
